messages.content: Mission target: 192.168.56.101. Begin the engagement now. Spawn the appropriate first agent.

{"thought": "STARTING NEW ENGAGEMENT: Target 192.168.56.101. Phase is OSINT — I need to begin with reconnaissance. According to my methodology, the first step for ANY unknown target is to perform port scanning and enumeration to understand the attack surface. This is the foundation before attempting exploitation. I will spawn a scanner agent to identify open ports, running services, and version information. This data will inform all subsequent exploitation decisions.", "action": "spawn_agent", "parameters": {"agent_type": "scanner", "target": "192.168.56.101", "task_type": "scan_tcp_ports", "options": {"ports": "1-10000"}}}
